input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.4.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.4.4.1
            TITLE: when specified, the equivalence of the chassis must be calculated as a flat panel with the

            CONTENT:
            rule F.4.4.1: When specified, the Equivalence of the chassis must be calculated as a flat panel with the
F.4.4.1 When specified, the Equivalence of the chassis must be calculated as a flat panel with the 
same composition as the chassis about the neutral axis of the laminate.

final_answer: When specified, the Equivalence of the chassis must be calculated as a flat panel with the same composition as the chassis about the neutral axis of the laminate.
